title: euthamia tenuifolia
intro: Euthamia tenuifolia, also known as bitter goldenrod, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated tissues and prevent infection. The health benefits of Euthamia tenuifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Euthamia tenuifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
